data.title: stop hook friction_suggestion_check does not scan tool-use-*.jsonl as specified in d6b4-3217 DD
data.description: Story d6b4-3217 done definition requires the stop hook to scan both tool-error-counter.json AND tool-use-*.jsonl. Current implementation (hook_friction_suggestion_check in session-misc-functions.sh) reads only tool-error-counter.json. tool-use-*.jsonl scanning is not implemented.
